sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 10.40 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.10)

statement.latex: (H.\,Bass). Let$G$be a group,$e$an idempotent matrix over${ Z}G$and let${ tr}\, e= _{g G}e_gg,\,\,\,\, e_g { Z}.$Strong conjecture:\/ for any non-trivial$x G$, the equation$_{g x} e_g=0$holds where$$denotes conjugacy in$G$. Weak conjecture:\/$_{g G} e_g=0$. The strong conjecture has been proved for finite, abelian and linear groups and the weak conjecture has been proved for residually finite grou...
